intro.title: AI Lab
intro.sub: Hard AI ideas, demystified. Each concept is a hands-on visual you can step through — built to make the abstract click in a couple of minutes.

concepts.title: Model Context Protocol
concepts.description: Why agents needed a standard, how the handshake works, and whether MCP rewrites your backend — a guided six-act walkthrough.

concepts.title: Agentic RAG
concepts.description: Documents become vectors in space, a query lights up its nearest neighbours, hybrid search fuses results, and the model streams a grounded answer — every RAG stage, visualized.

teaser: // more concepts in flight — added as I find better ways to explain them
